accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context (DoD administers, statute amended is PL 104-307).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; enactment date June 12, 2025 and provisions match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes DoD sale of aircraft and parts for wildfire suppression.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Identifies the amendment to Section 2 of the Wildfire Suppression Aircraft Transfer Act of 1996.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the restriction that aircraft may be used only for aircraft services for wildfire suppression purposes.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the authority period from enactment (June 12, 2025) to October 1, 2035.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures all operative changes: 'or water' additions, use restriction, cross-reference fix, and reauthorization period.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names DoD, the 1996 Act, and the relevant subsections.

correct_figures.why: Dates June 12, 2025 and October 1, 2035 match the bill.
